must_detect.matched_text:
Confidential: Incident Report — Unpublished Price Sensitive Information under SEBI (PIT) Regulations 2015 for Navprabha Digital Infra Limited (NSE: NVDL; fictional), not for external circulation.
On 03-Jun-2026 21:10 IST, NDIL detected unauthorized access to the customer KYC repository via a compromised vendor VPN, indicating a credential-stuffing cyber incident.
Exposed fields may include name, mobile, email, masked bank IFSC, PAN, and Aadhaar; example records: Ms. Tanvi Kulkarni, +91-98765-43210, tanvi.kulkarni@samplemail.in, PAN: QWERT1234Z, Aadhaar: 8426 1919 0303.
One affected individual is a child under 18 (Master Rohan Verma, 17), contact: guardian Smt. Asha Verma, asha.verma@samplemail.in; consent records under DPDPA are being verified.
Preliminary scope: 3,248 profiles including 112 designated employees; no funds movement observed; CERT-In notification draft prepared; data not yet disclosed to exchanges under LODR Reg 30.
This incident intersects with a not-yet-announced pilot with Trishul Crypto Markets Pvt. Ltd. for virtual digital asset custody; draft term sheet includes a minimum revenue guarantee of INR 1.6 crore and a 0.15% vaulting fee.
The above pilot and the breach are UPSI; the trading window for designated persons is closed until two trading days after public disclosure; Chinese wall between Operations and Treasury has been re-briefed.
Insider list created today includes Mr. Arvind Rao (CFO), Ms. Neha Kapoor (Company Secretary), Dr. Rishi Dev (CISO), and Shri Gautam Iyer (Independent Director); acknowledgments tracked in ILMS; contact: compliance@navprabha.example.com.
Do not tip any external party, analysts, or channel partners; investor FAQs and a holding statement are in legal review; draft NSE/BSE intimation and press release are embargoed until Board approval.
